name: A124
description: 8m electromagnetic wave that disables enemy skill activation for 20s and inflicts 25 damage.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Force field helps absorb the engage if activated before A124 gets in range.

counters.name: Kenta
counters.reason: Front-facing damage reduction helps survive the close-range punish window.

counters.name: Tatsuya
counters.reason: Fast dash helps escape the 8m disable zone.

name: Alok
description: Creates a 5m aura that increases movement speed and restores HP for 10s.

counters.name: A124
counters.reason: Can deny activation in close-range engagements.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Slow and firing-speed reduction reduce Alok's chase value.

counters.name: Nero
counters.reason: Anti-Gloo zone and HP drain punish teams trying to stabilize in the aura.

name: Chrono
description: Creates a 10-second force field that blocks 1000 damage.

counters.name: Skyler
counters.reason: Strong at breaking nearby Gloo setups and forcing movement after the shield ends.

counters.name: Ignis
counters.reason: Can burn exit paths and punish where the user leaves the shield.

counters.name: Iris
counters.reason: Useful when Chrono is layered with Gloo cover and defensive setups.

name: Clu
description: Reveals enemies within 80m who are not crouching or prone and shares info with teammates.

counters.name: Morse
counters.reason: Cannot be detected while in stealth mode.

counters.name: Wukong
counters.reason: Disguise and patient positioning reduce the value of scans.

counters.name: Santino
counters.reason: Mannequin pressure and swaps create confusion around real positioning.

name: Dimitri
description: Creates a healing zone where allies recover HP and can self-revive while downed.

counters.name: Ignis
counters.reason: Burns the area and punishes stationary healing setups.

counters.name: Nero
counters.reason: Prevents comfortable bunker play and adds HP drain pressure.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Slows and debuffs targets before the healing zone can swing the fight.

name: Homer
description: Sends a drone that slows enemy movement and firing speed while dealing damage.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Lets a team turtle through the slow-and-focus window.

counters.name: Kenta
counters.reason: Protects frontal hold positions while waiting out the debuff.

counters.name: Tatsuya
counters.reason: Can quickly break away before follow-up damage lands.

name: Ignis
description: Deploys a moving flaming screen that damages enemies and Gloo Walls.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Provides emergency safety during flame pressure.

counters.name: Tatsuya
counters.reason: Dash helps cross or sidestep the burning lane.

counters.name: Santino
counters.reason: Can reposition out of the danger line and create angle confusion.

name: Iris
description: For 15s, firing at Gloo marks nearby enemies and penetrates Gloo to damage them.

counters.name: Skyler
counters.reason: Removing Gloo cover reduces Iris's special value.

counters.name: Oscar
counters.reason: Destroys the first Gloo Walls in his path and breaks cover setups.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Gives a brief safety window to reposition after cover is compromised.

name: K
description: Provides EP utility through mode switching, including EP conversion and regeneration.

counters.name: A124
counters.reason: Close-range skill denial can disrupt sustain timing.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Debuffs reduce the user's ability to get long-value trades.

counters.name: Clu
counters.reason: Info pressure helps force faster collapses before sustain matters.

name: Kassie
description: Creates a healing bond with a teammate and can trigger a large instant heal.
counter_category: force separation / burst the linked duo

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Slows bonded teammates and makes isolation easier.

counters.name: Ignis
counters.reason: Punishes teams trying to hold one line while bonded.

counters.name: Clu
counters.reason: Provides info to focus the supported target quickly.

name: Kenta
description: Creates a frontal shield that reduces incoming weapon damage.
counter_category: re-angle / attack from the side / bait shots

counters.name: Tatsuya
counters.reason: Dash helps break frontal alignment.

counters.name: Santino
counters.reason: Teleport repositioning changes the fight angle.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Slows Kenta and punishes him when he tries to fire through shield uptime.

name: Koda
description: Boosts movement speed and reveals enemies behind cover within 50m.

counters.name: Morse
counters.reason: Stealth prevents enemy detection during the active window.

counters.name: Wukong
counters.reason: Crouch-prone discipline and disguise reduce scan value.

counters.name: Santino
counters.reason: Fake presence and teleporting make reads less reliable.

name: Morse
description: Enters stealth, becomes hard to see, cannot be detected, and gains movement speed.

counters.name: Clu
counters.reason: Strong once Morse exits stealth or teammates around him are exposed.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Can punish likely exit timings and nearby re-entry paths.

counters.name: Ryden
counters.reason: Trap placement is strong against predicted escape routes.

name: Nero
description: Throws a plushie that creates a zone where enemies lose HP and cannot place Gloo Walls.
counter_category: leave the zone / survive the collapse

counters.name: Skyler
counters.reason: Useful when fights are heavily tied to Gloo control.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Provides a stall window if caught in the anti-Gloo zone.

counters.name: Tatsuya
counters.reason: Fast reposition helps escape the dangerous area.

name: Orion
description: Consumes Crimson Energy to become untouchable for a short time while draining HP from nearby enemies.
counter_category: kite the duration / punish after invulnerability

counters.name: Steffie
counters.reason: Helps reduce follow-up ammo damage after Orion exits protection.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Lets a team absorb the immediate post-activation collapse.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Excellent for punishing Orion once he commits into close range.

name: Oscar
description: Dashes forward, detonates Gloo Walls, damages enemies, and knocks them back.
counter_category: survive first contact / punish landing point

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Safest direct answer to a hard entry.

counters.name: Kenta
counters.reason: Front-facing mitigation helps live through the dash hit.

counters.name: Ryden
counters.reason: Punishes predictable paths and post-dash positioning.

name: Ryden
description: Deploys an explosive spider that catches enemies, slows them heavily, and drains HP.

counters.name: Tatsuya
counters.reason: Dash helps avoid or break trap pathing.

counters.name: Santino
counters.reason: Teleport and decoy pressure can waste trap value.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Provides cover if someone gets trapped and focused.

name: Santino
description: Spawns a mannequin and allows position swaps with it.

counters.name: Clu
counters.reason: Shared scan info helps identify the real target after repositioning.

counters.name: Koda
counters.reason: Repeated cover detection is strong against teleport mind games.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Can punish Santino right after the swap or retreat.

name: Skyler
description: Sends a sonic wave that destroys nearby Gloo Walls.
counter_category: reposition immediately / avoid static cover dependence

counters.name: Tatsuya
counters.reason: Fast movement helps leave broken-cover positions.

counters.name: Santino
counters.reason: Teleport repositioning reduces the value of the wave.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Provides emergency safety when your Gloo line is broken.

name: Steffie
description: Creates a zone that nullifies throwables, restores armor, and reduces ammo damage.
counter_category: overwrite the zone / force them out

counters.name: Ignis
counters.reason: Area denial punishes teams holding one fixed spot.

counters.name: Nero
counters.reason: Anti-Gloo and HP drain pressure bunker play.

counters.name: A124
counters.reason: Close-range activation denial is strong when enemies anchor tightly.

name: Tatsuya
description: Rapid dash forward that can reset on knockdowns.
counter_category: path punish / deny the burst entry

counters.name: Ryden
counters.reason: Strong against predictable dash routes.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Slow and fire-rate debuff reduce follow-up after the dash.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Blocks immediate burst when Tatsuya dives in.

name: Wukong
description: Transforms into a bush for 10s and resets cooldown on takedown.

counters.name: Clu
counters.reason: Scan value is strong once Wukong moves or exits disguise.

counters.name: Koda
counters.reason: Helps reveal suspicious cover positions.

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Drone pressure checks hidden positions and punishes the reveal.

name: Xayne
description: Enters a temporary state with bonus Shield Points that can refresh on knockdowns.
counter_category: stall the window / reduce burst conversion

counters.name: Homer
counters.reason: Slows the push and lowers her ability to convert aggression.

counters.name: Chrono
counters.reason: Prevents the shielded engage from becoming a clean knock.

counters.name: Kenta
counters.reason: Helps absorb her frontal all-in timing.
